description_long: This is a modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a robust wooden frame and light gray upholstered cushions. The sofa features a right-hand chaise extension, providing ample seating space for multiple people. The exterior frame is constructed from wood with a visible grain pattern, giving it a natural and contemporary look. The seat and back cushions are uniform, flat, and appear to be firmly attached, offering a clean and minimalist aesthetic. The armrests are integrated into the wooden frame, matching the height of the backrest and providing a boxy, geometric profile. The legs are mostly concealed, with only small, dark supports visible at the base, contributing to a grounded and sturdy appearance.
description: A modern L-shaped sectional sofa with a wooden frame and light gray upholstered cushions, featuring a right-hand chaise and integrated armrests.
description_view_0: Front angled view showing the L-shape, wooden frame, and light gray cushions with the right-hand chaise clearly visible.
description_view_1: Direct front view highlighting the three seat sections, backrest, and the full width of the chaise extension.
description_view_2: Side view displaying the solid wooden frame and the uniform height of the backrest and armrest.
description_view_3: Rear view emphasizing the continuous wooden back panel and the sofa's boxy, geometric structure.
attribute_cushion_arrangement: Three uniform seat cushions and three matching back cushions, all attached and arranged in an L-shaped sectional layout.
attribute_armrest_style: Boxy, integrated armrests made of wood, matching the backrest height and featuring a straight, geometric profile with no visible padding or decorative elements.
attribute_leg_design: Legs are mostly hidden, with small, dark supports visible at the base corners, likely made of metal or plastic, providing a low-profile and sturdy foundation.
attribute_backrest_type: Continuous, straight backrest at medium height, segmented into three sections corresponding to the seat cushions, with attached, flat cushions and no visible tufting or decorative features.
attribute_upholstery_pattern: Solid light gray fabric with a smooth, matte finish and no visible pattern, tufting, or decorative stitching.
